headline: 577/880 maintainer-adjudicated regressions detected at the introducing PR
method: Run the shipped jrs:java-review-agent finders on the diff that INTRODUCED a bug, score recall against the defect the maintainers' later fix PR proves. Finders-only (upper-bound recall). 0 fabrications across all runs. Finder model is per-pair (see finder_model field) — batches 1–7 Opus 4.8 (n=1–70), batches 8+ Grok 4.5 (n=71+); see finder_model per pair (Grok 4.5 n=810, Opus 4.8 n=70). Scoring regime is also per-pair (scoring field): 'self-scored' segments (n=71–220, 291–370) were scored by the mining orchestrator with the fix PR open and are pending blind re-audit — the one sampled window of that regime dropped 23% on blind re-score; n=221–290 is blind-rescored; n≥371 is quote-backed (bank_mined_pair.py, scored_blind); n=531+ re-ran under the second-pass / Layer B surface_complete finder prompt. Treat the headline as a mixed-method upper bound, not one measurement. Recent hard-gate rate window n=781–880 (batches 80–89): 42/100 (42%). Miss postmortem: evals/batch80-89-miss-postmortem-2026-07-23.md (adjacent-target dominant; empty minority). Soft shortlist R9 multi-sibling/dual-path.
